mining_session.focus: Portfolio projects, UX design, industrial design, product management
mining_session.portfolio_overview: 20+ years experience leading design and innovation

portfolio_statement.tagline: Human-centric design is paramount to my product strategies
portfolio_statement.experience: Over 20 years of experience leading design, innovation efforts, managing young and seasoned designers alike
portfolio_statement.approach: Big-picture thinking and thorough research to create user-centered, straightforward solutions that drive impactful results

reinsurance_associates.type: SaaS Portal Features - UX Design/Project Management

achievements.achievement: Designed and delivered custom protective goggles for Nike-signed NBA star Amare Stoudemire through user-centered industrial design process, conducting direct user interviews to identify stability and comfort issues, prototyping two design solutions, and implementing user-tested modifications that resolved bruising and irritation problems

metrics.prototypes_developed: 2 design options with different strap systems
metrics.usability_testing_sessions: Multiple sessions including Nike photo shoot warm-up
metrics.career_duration: Worn for remainder of professional career

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study documenting full design process from problem identification through final implementation
achievements.outcome: Successfully resolved stability and comfort issues; athlete wore protective goggles for remainder of career, preventing potential blindness from eye injuries

achievements.achievement: Led UX design and project management for SaaS portal automation features resulting in fewest seasonal temp employees in 5 years, with 55% of online statements automatically collected and filed, and 68% of PDF uploads filing automatically, enabling team to work ahead of tax deadlines for first time

metrics.automation_rate_online: 55% of online statements auto-collected and filed
metrics.automation_rate_upload: 68% of PDF files auto-file via drag-and-drop
metrics.statements_automated: 2,400+ statements per month via 3 web crawlers
metrics.efficiency_improvement: Team ahead of tax deadlines (previously rushed)

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study with quantified outcomes and feature documentation
achievements.outcome: Dramatic efficiency improvement enabling team to meet deadlines ahead of schedule while reducing seasonal staffing costs

achievements.achievement: Designed and oversaw development of Secret Vault credential management system streamlining access to multiple online portals, eliminating Excel-based credential tracking headache and implementing shared 2FA system to handle automated programs while enhancing client efficiency
achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study documenting user interviews, user flows, and feature implementation
achievements.outcome: Streamlined credential management across team, enabled automation infrastructure, eliminated manual Excel tracking

achievements.achievement: Conducted user interviews identifying report usability issues (annoying filters, losing place on clicks, not worth the trouble), then redesigned reports with simplified filters, resorted columns, and improved navigation behavior, transforming unused feature into valuable efficiency tool

metrics.modifications: Simplified filters, resorted columns, behavioral changes
metrics.adoption_change: From 'not worth using' to actively used tool

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study with direct user quotes and before/after modifications
achievements.outcome: Transformed unused report feature into valuable tool helping team quickly identify missing statements

achievements.achievement: Performed quantitative analysis to identify richest automation targets, then oversaw development team's implementation of 3 web crawlers collecting over 2,400 statements monthly, achieving 55% automation rate for online statement collection and filing
achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study documenting analysis process and implementation results
achievements.outcome: Significant automation of repetitive collection tasks, freeing team for higher-value work

achievements.achievement: Designed and developed drag-and-drop file upload feature with automated PDF parsing and intelligent field mapping, achieving 68% automatic filing rate for uploaded PDFs through learning mapper interface that guides system to locate and associate appropriate fields

metrics.parsing_system: PDF text field parser with intelligent mapping

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study with user flow documentation and automation metrics
achievements.outcome: Dramatically simplified upload process while achieving high automation rate, reducing manual filing work

achievements.achievement: Conducted comprehensive user interviews with accounting clerks identifying critical efficiency bottlenecks across three areas (identification, collection, uploading), uncovering specific pain points like 'spending ton of time digging to figure out what's missing' and 'Excel file for logins is constant headache'

metrics.pain_points_identified: Multiple specific issues with direct quotes

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study with direct user quotes and problem categorization
achievements.outcome: Clear problem definition enabling targeted feature development addressing real user needs

achievements.achievement: Led branding, digital marketing campaigns, and UI/UX design for golf shot tracking startup app, creating hi-fidelity Figma prototype and conducting early usability testing that revealed critical insight: golfers unwilling to pull out phone after every shot, leading to strategic pivot toward Apple Watch app requirement

metrics.deliverables: Branding, marketing campaigns, UI/UX design, icon design
metrics.strategic_insight: Identified need for watch app before development completion

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study documenting design process and usability testing insights
achievements.outcome: Early usability testing prevented costly development of unusable phone-only solution, identified watch app requirement

achievements.achievement: Conducted competitive research analyzing multiple golf tracking apps identifying market gap: existing apps only track shots during rounds, not driving range practice, establishing unique market positioning for startup's driving range-focused solution

metrics.differentiation: Unique focus on practice vs rounds

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study documenting competitive research and market positioning
achievements.outcome: Validated unique market opportunity and informed design aesthetic based on widely-adopted competitor patterns

achievements.achievement: Implemented comprehensive usability testing methodology presenting two prototype options to professional athlete during Nike photo shoot warm-up, observing distinct preference for silicone strap solution, then integrating user feedback and implementing final modifications into innovative construction requiring specialized NYC fabrication

metrics.prototypes_tested: 2 design options (temple extensions vs silicone strap)
metrics.iterations: Multiple rounds from initial designs to final modifications

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study documenting prototype development and testing process
achievements.outcome: User-validated design solution with clear preference data guiding final implementation

achievements.achievement: Achieved 'light bulb moment' realizing user-focused Industrial Design philosophy and process aligns with UX fundamentals, showcasing full integration of user and usability testing into design process as crowning achievement demonstrating cross-discipline design thinking
achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study with explicit statement about design philosophy realization
achievements.outcome: Established integrated design approach combining ID and UX methodologies, informing future work

achievements.achievement: Demonstrated early career growth in digital design through Shot Tracker project, learning Figma and gaining valuable lesson about efficiency and need for early usability/user testing using lo-fi prototypes before high-fidelity development

metrics.key_lesson: Early usability testing with lo-fi prototypes

achievements.evidence: Portfolio case study explicitly noting learning and growth
achievements.outcome: Established best practice of early testing with lo-fi prototypes, preventing costly late-stage changes

suggested_additions: Reinsurance Associates automation achievements (55% auto-collection, 68% auto-filing)
Report redesign based on user interviews

amare_stoudemire.rationale: Unique Nike collaboration, industrial design showcase, strong narrative
